Query: SELECT pa.created_at AS asset_created_date, pa.updated_at AS asset_updated_date, pa.deleted_at AS asset_deleted_date, pa.id AS asset_id, pa.batch_date AS asset_batch_date, TRIM(pa.poi) AS asset_poi, TRIM(pa.imei) AS asset_imei, UPPER(pa.serial_number) AS asset_sn, TRIM(pa.tid) AS asset_tid, TRIM(pa.mid) asset_mid, TRIM(pc.name) AS asset_name, TRIM(pc.specification) AS asset_specification, TRIM(pi.name) AS asset_type, TRIM(pac.name) AS asset_category, TRIM(pco.name) AS asset_condition, TRIM(pas.name) AS asset_status, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, pa.batch_date, now()) AS asset_age, CASE WHEN pa.asset_status_id = 3 THEN 0 ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, pa.updated_at, now()) END AS asset_idle_time_in_month, TRIM(pwu.name) AS asset_work_unit, TRIM(pwu.address) AS asset_work_unit_address, COALESCE(TRIM(prp.name), TRIM(pr.name), 'OPS BSD') AS asset_work_unit_region, TRIM(pt.name) AS asset_work_unit_team_name, COALESCE(CASE WHEN LOWER(pt.name) = 'PCS-07M' THEN 'PCS' ELSE TRIM(pt.alt_name) END, 'PCS') AS asset_work_unit_team_altname, TRIM(pa.latest_cycle) as asset_curr_cycle, TRIM(pa.cycle) AS asset_last_cycle, TRIM(pu1.name) AS asset_last_updated_by_name, TRIM(pu1.email) AS asset_last_updated_by_email, TRIM(pd.name) AS asset_last_updated_by_department, TRIM(pu2.name) AS asset_last_updated_by_superior_name, TRIM(pu2.email) AS asset_last_updated_by_superior_email, TRIM(pwuu.name) AS asset_last_updated_by_work_unit, COALESCE(TRIM(prpu.name), TRIM(pru.name), 'OPS BSD') AS asset_last_updated_by_region, op.asset_opname_date, TRIM(op.opname_name) AS opname_name, TRIM(op.opname_region) AS opname_region, op.opname_date, op.opname_status, CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, GREATEST(COALESCE(op.asset_opname_date, '1970-01-01'), COALESCE( op.opname_date, '1970-01-01')), now()) > 3 AND pa.asset_status_id NOT IN (1,3,19) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_missing FROM picas.assets AS pa LEFT JOIN picas.catalogs AS pc ON pc.id = pa.catalog_id LEFT JOIN picas.items AS pi ON pi.id = pc.item_id LEFT JOIN picas.asset_sub_categories AS pac ON pac.id = pi.asset_sub_category_id LEFT JOIN picas.conditions AS pco ON pco.id = pa.condition_id LEFT JOIN picas.asset_statuses AS pas ON pas.id = pa.asset_status_id LEFT JOIN picas.work_units AS pwu ON pwu.id = pa.work_unit_id LEFT JOIN picas.regions AS pr ON pr.id = pwu.region_id LEFT JOIN picas.regions AS prp ON prp.id = pr.parent_id LEFT JOIN picas.teams AS pt ON pt.id = pwu.team_id LEFT JOIN picas.users AS pu1 ON pu1.id = pa.user_id LEFT JOIN picas.departments AS pd ON pd.id = pu1.department_id LEFT JOIN picas.users AS pu2 ON pu2.id = pu1.superior_id LEFT JOIN picas.work_units AS pwuu ON pwuu.id = pu1.work_unit_id LEFT JOIN picas.regions AS pru ON pru.id = pwuu.region_id LEFT JOIN picas.regions AS prpu ON prpu.id = pru.parent_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UPPER(paor.serial_number) AS asset_sn, paor.created_at AS asset_opname_date, pao.title AS opname_name, pao.created_at AS opname_date, COALESCE(prop.name, pro.name) AS opname_region, paorst.name AS opname_status, pao.asset_opname_status_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY paor.serial_number ORDER BY paor.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM picas.asset_opname_results AS paor LEFT JOIN picas.asset_opname_result_statuses paorst ON paorst.id = paor.asset_opname_result_status_id LEFT JOIN picas.asset_opname_regions AS paors ON paors.id = paor.asset_opname_region_id LEFT JOIN picas.regions AS pro ON pro.id = paors.region_id LEFT JOIN picas.regions AS prop ON prop.id = pro.parent_id LEFT JOIN picas.asset_opnames AS pao ON pao.id = paors.asset_opname_id AND pao.asset_opname_status_id = 6 WHERE paor.is_verified = 1 ) AS op ON op.asset_sn = UPPER(pa.serial_number) AND op.rn = 1 AND op.asset_opname_status_id = 6 WHERE 1=1 AND pi.name = 'EDC' ;

column17: ud.technician_work_unit_region FROM ( SELECT mi.id AS inventory_id
column18: CASE WHEN mi.created_at <= '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE mi.created_at END as created_at
column19: CASE WHEN mi.updated_at <= '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE mi.updated_at END as updated_at
column20: CASE WHEN mi.deleted_at <= '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN NULL ELSE mi.deleted_at END as deleted_at
column28: mit.name AS inventory_type FROM mavis.inventories AS mi LEFT JOIN mavis.inventory_types AS mit ON mit.id = mi.inventory_type_id LEFT JOIN mavis.sps AS misps ON misps.id = mi.sp_id WHERE mi.sn REGEXP '^[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9]*$' ) AS i LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mu.id AS technician_id
column30: TRIM(msp.name) AS technician_work_unit_region FROM mavis.users AS mu LEFT JOIN mavis.sps AS msp ON msp.id = mu.sp_id ) AS ud ON ud.technician_id = i.technician_id;

Name: s_view.pose_users_dummy
Query: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW s_view.pose_users_dummy AS SELECT users.username FROM s_cdc_subscription.users WHERE 1 = 1 AND (users.username ~~ '%dummy%'::text OR users.username ~~ '%test%'::text OR users.username ~~ '%sales%'::text) UNION SELECT DISTINCT submission_poses.user_name AS username FROM s_cdc_tap.submission_poses WHERE 1 = 1 AND submission_poses.tag = 2 AND (submission_poses.user_name ~~ '%dummy%'::text OR submission_poses.user_name ~~ '%test%'::text OR submission_poses.user_name ~~ '%sales%'::text);

Value: -- s_cdc_tap.submission_poses definition -- Drop table -- DROP TABLE s_cdc_tap.submission_poses; CREATE TABLE s_cdc_tap.submission_poses ( id int8 NOT NULL, created_at timestamp(6) NULL, updated_at timestamp(6) NULL, deleted_at timestamp(6) NULL, merchant_type int8 NULL, submission_type text NULL, merchant_id int8 NULL, tids text NULL, merchant_name text NULL, pic_name text NULL, pic_phone text NULL, pic_email text NULL, ro_mavis_id int8 NULL, user_id int8 NULL, user_name text NULL, training_date timestamp(6) NULL, status int8 NULL, note text NULL, is_revision int2 DEFAULT 0 NULL, revision_at timestamp(6) NULL, address text NULL, district_id text NULL, regency_id int8 NULL, tag int8 DEFAULT 1 NULL, pose_subscription_id int8 NULL, __deleted text NULL, cdc_sync_at_utc timestamp(6) NULL, nik text NULL, qris_nik text NULL, business_description text NULL, qris_npwp text NULL, qris_account_number text NULL, "position" text NULL, qris_account_name text NULL, qris_bank text NULL, CONSTRAINT submission_poses_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id) ); Name: s_view.pose_subs_log
Value: -- s_view.pose_subs_log source CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW s_view.pose_subs_log AS WITH RECURSIVE tap_order AS ( SELECT pose_subscription_histories.order_id, pose_subscription_histories.pose_subscription_id, pose_subscription_histories.updated_at, pose_subscription_histories.cdc_sync_at_utc FROM s_cdc_tap.pose_subscription_histories WHERE pose_subscription_histories.subscribe_at IS NOT NULL ), subs_detail AS ( SELECT GREATEST(sdl.created_at, ps.updated_at) AS created_at, GREATEST(sdl.updated_at, ps.updated_at) AS updated_at, GREATEST(sdl.cdc_sync_at_utc, ps.cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc, sdl.subs_log_id, sdl.package_service_id, sdl.qty, sdl.qty * ps.price AS price, ps.name FROM s_cdc_subscription.subs_detail_logs sdl LEFT JOIN s_cdc_subscription.package_services ps ON ps.id = sdl.package_service_id ), raw_data AS ( SELECT ssl.id, ssl.created_at, ssl.updated_at, ssl.deleted_at, ssl.user_id, ssl.package_sub_id, ssl.is_paid, ssl.is_first_time, ssl.payment_method, ssl.payment_date, ssl.start_date, ssl.expired_date, ssl.bank_code, ssl.bank_name, ssl.adm_fee, ssl.payment_link, ssl.order_id, ssl.total_price, ssl.type, ssl.__deleted, ssl.cdc_sync_at_utc, sum( CASE WHEN sps.service_id = 1 THEN sps.price::numeric WHEN sps.service_id = 2 THEN (sd.price * sps.period)::numeric * 0.89 ELSE 0::numeric END) OVER (PARTITION BY ssl.order_id) AS total_order_price, CASE WHEN sps.service_id = 1 THEN sps.price::numeric WHEN sps.service_id = 2 THEN (sd.price * sps.period)::numeric * 0.89 ELSE NULL::bigint::numeric END AS price, sd.qty, ssl.voucher_value, CASE WHEN sps.service_id = 1 THEN ssl.tax::numeric WHEN sps.service_id = 2 THEN (sd.price * sps.period)::numeric * 0.11 ELSE NULL::bigint::numeric END AS tax, CASE WHEN sps.service_id = 1 THEN 'POSe Mobile'::text WHEN sps.service_id = 2 THEN sd.name ELSE NULL::text END AS name, sps.service_id, sd.package_service_id, sps.period, sps.bonus, sps.uom, sps.code, su.username, su.email, su.fullname, su.no_hp, su.wallet, pu.merchant_id, too.pose_subscription_id, sps.updated_at AS sps_updated_at, sps.cdc_sync_at_utc AS sps_cdc_sync_at_utc, too.updated_at AS too_updated_at, too.cdc_sync_at_utc AS too_cdc_sync_at_utc, sd.created_at AS sd_created_at, sd.updated_at AS sd_updated_at, sd.cdc_sync_at_utc AS sd_cdc_sync_at_utc FROM s_cdc_subscription.subs_logs ssl LEFT JOIN s_cdc_subscription.package_subs sps ON ssl.package_sub_id = sps.id LEFT JOIN tap_order too ON too.order_id = ssl.order_id LEFT JOIN s_cdc_subscription.users su ON su.id = ssl.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT users.username, users.merchant_id, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY users.username ORDER BY users.created_at DESC, users.id DESC) AS rn FROM s_cdc_pose.users) pu ON pu.username = su.username AND pu.rn = 1 LEFT JOIN subs_detail sd ON sd.subs_log_id = ssl.id WHERE ssl.is_paid = 1 ), ordered_subs AS ( SELECT distinct_subs.id, distinct_subs.username, distinct_subs.payment_date, distinct_subs.period, distinct_subs.bonus, distinct_subs.uom, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY distinct_subs.username ORDER BY distinct_subs.payment_date, distinct_subs.id) AS rn FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT raw_data.id, raw_data.username, raw_data.payment_date, raw_data.period, raw_data.bonus, raw_data.uom FROM raw_data) distinct_subs ), cte_dates AS ( SELECT r.id, r.username, r.rn, r.payment_date::timestamp with time zone AS start_date, (r.payment_date::date + concat_ws(' '::text, r.period + r.bonus, r.uom)::interval + '1 day'::interval - '00:00:01'::interval)::timestamp with time zone AS expired_date FROM ordered_subs r WHERE r.rn = 1 UNION ALL SELECT r.id, r.username, r.rn, CASE WHEN r.payment_date > rec.expired_date THEN r.payment_date::timestamp with time zone ELSE rec.expired_date + '00:00:01'::interval END AS start_date, CASE WHEN r.payment_date > rec.expired_date THEN r.payment_date::timestamp with time zone ELSE rec.expired_date + '00:00:01'::interval END + concat_ws(' '::text, r.period + r.bonus, r.uom)::interval + '1 day'::interval - '00:00:01'::interval AS expired_date FROM ordered_subs r JOIN cte_dates rec ON r.username = rec.username AND r.rn = (rec.rn + 1) ) SELECT rd.id AS subs_id, rd.pose_subscription_id, rd.user_id, rd.merchant_id, rd.username, rd.fullname, rd.email, rd.no_hp, rd.wallet, rd.order_id, rd.price, rd.qty, CASE WHEN rd.total_order_price > 0::numeric THEN rd.price / rd.total_order_price * rd.voucher_value::numeric ELSE 0::numeric END AS voucher_value_item, rd.voucher_value, rd.tax, rd.name, rd.service_id, rd.package_service_id, rd.period, rd.uom, rd.code, concat_ws(' '::text, rd.period, rd.uom) AS package, concat_ws(' '::text, rd.period + rd.bonus, rd.uom) AS real_package, NULLIF(rd.payment_method, ''::text) AS payment_method, rd.payment_date, cd.start_date, cd.expired_date, rd.is_first_time, rd.is_paid, rd.bank_code, rd.bank_name, rd.package_sub_id, CASE WHEN now() >= cd.start_date AND now() <= cd.expired_date AND rd.is_paid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_active, rd.created_at, GREATEST(rd.updated_at, rd.sps_updated_at, rd.too_updated_at, rd.sd_updated_at) AS updated_at, rd.deleted_at, GREATEST(rd.cdc_sync_at_utc, rd.sps_cdc_sync_at_utc, rd.too_cdc_sync_at_utc, rd.sd_cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc FROM raw_data rd JOIN cte_dates cd ON rd.id = cd.id;

Name: s_view.tap_users_sales
Value: -- s_view.tap_users_sales source CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW s_view.tap_users_sales AS WITH users AS ( SELECT DISTINCT tu.created_at, tu.updated_at, tu.deleted_at, tu.deactivation_date, tu.joining_date, tu.id, tu.nik_pcs, tu.username, tu.email, tu.nama_lengkap, tu.referral_code, tc.name AS company, tu.leader_id, tr.name AS role, tu.ro_mavis_id, GREATEST(tu.cdc_sync_at_utc, tc.cdc_sync_at_utc, tmhr.cdc_sync_at_utc, tr.cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc FROM s_cdc_tap.users tu LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.companies tc ON tc.id = tu.company_id LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.model_has_roles tmhr ON tmhr.model_id = tu.id LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.roles tr ON tr.id = tmhr.role_id ), users_sales AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (u.id) u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.deactivation_date, u.joining_date, u.id, u.nik_pcs, u.username, u.email, u.nama_lengkap, u.referral_code, u.company, u.role, u.leader_id, l.id AS sales_leader_id, l.nama_lengkap AS leader_name, m.id AS sales_manager_id, m.nama_lengkap AS manager_name, h.id AS sales_head_id, h.nama_lengkap AS head_name, trm.name AS area, GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, l.cdc_sync_at_utc, m.cdc_sync_at_utc, h.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users u LEFT JOIN users l ON l.id = u.leader_id AND l.role = 'Leader'::text LEFT JOIN users m ON m.id = l.leader_id AND m.role ~~ '%Manager%'::text LEFT JOIN users h ON h.id = m.leader_id AND h.role = 'Head'::text LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.ro_mavis trm ON trm.id = h.ro_mavis_id WHERE u.role = 'Sales'::text ORDER BY u.id, (GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, l.cdc_sync_at_utc, m.cdc_sync_at_utc, h.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc)) DESC ), users_leader AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (u.id) u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.deactivation_date, u.joining_date, u.id, u.nik_pcs, u.username, u.email, u.nama_lengkap, u.referral_code, u.company, u.role, u.leader_id, u.id AS sales_leader_id, u.nama_lengkap AS leader_name, m.id AS sales_manager_id, m.nama_lengkap AS manager_name, h.id AS sales_head_id, h.nama_lengkap AS head_name, trm.name AS area, GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, m.cdc_sync_at_utc, h.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users u LEFT JOIN users m ON m.id = u.leader_id AND m.role ~~ '%Manager%'::text LEFT JOIN users h ON h.id = m.leader_id AND h.role = 'Head'::text LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.ro_mavis trm ON trm.id = h.ro_mavis_id WHERE u.role = 'Leader'::text ORDER BY u.id, (GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, m.cdc_sync_at_utc, h.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc)) DESC ), users_manager AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (u.id) u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.deactivation_date, u.joining_date, u.id, u.nik_pcs, u.username, u.email, u.nama_lengkap, u.referral_code, u.company, u.role, u.leader_id, u.id AS sales_leader_id, u.nama_lengkap AS leader_name, u.id AS sales_manager_id, u.nama_lengkap AS manager_name, h.id AS sales_head_id, h.nama_lengkap AS head_name, trm.name AS area, GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, h.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users u LEFT JOIN users h ON h.id = u.leader_id AND h.role = 'Head'::text LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.ro_mavis trm ON trm.id = h.ro_mavis_id WHERE u.role ~~ '%Manager%'::text ORDER BY u.id, (GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, h.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc)) DESC ), users_head AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (u.id) u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.deactivation_date, u.joining_date, u.id, u.nik_pcs, u.username, u.email, u.nama_lengkap, u.referral_code, u.company, u.role, u.leader_id, u.id AS sales_leader_id, u.nama_lengkap AS leader_name, u.id AS sales_manager_id, u.nama_lengkap AS manager_name, u.id AS sales_head_id, u.nama_lengkap AS head_name, trm.name AS area, GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc) AS cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users u LEFT JOIN s_cdc_tap.ro_mavis trm ON trm.id = u.ro_mavis_id WHERE u.role = 'Head'::text ORDER BY u.id, (GREATEST(u.cdc_sync_at_utc, trm.cdc_sync_at_utc)) DESC ) SELECT users_sales.created_at, users_sales.updated_at, users_sales.deleted_at, users_sales.deactivation_date, users_sales.joining_date, users_sales.id, users_sales.nik_pcs, users_sales.username, users_sales.email, users_sales.nama_lengkap, users_sales.referral_code, users_sales.company, users_sales.role, users_sales.leader_id, users_sales.sales_leader_id, users_sales.leader_name, users_sales.sales_manager_id, users_sales.manager_name, users_sales.sales_head_id, users_sales.head_name, users_sales.area, users_sales.cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users_sales UNION SELECT users_leader.created_at, users_leader.updated_at, users_leader.deleted_at, users_leader.deactivation_date, users_leader.joining_date, users_leader.id, users_leader.nik_pcs, users_leader.username, users_leader.email, users_leader.nama_lengkap, users_leader.referral_code, users_leader.company, users_leader.role, users_leader.leader_id, users_leader.sales_leader_id, users_leader.leader_name, users_leader.sales_manager_id, users_leader.manager_name, users_leader.sales_head_id, users_leader.head_name, users_leader.area, users_leader.cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users_leader UNION SELECT users_manager.created_at, users_manager.updated_at, users_manager.deleted_at, users_manager.deactivation_date, users_manager.joining_date, users_manager.id, users_manager.nik_pcs, users_manager.username, users_manager.email, users_manager.nama_lengkap, users_manager.referral_code, users_manager.company, users_manager.role, users_manager.leader_id, users_manager.sales_leader_id, users_manager.leader_name, users_manager.sales_manager_id, users_manager.manager_name, users_manager.sales_head_id, users_manager.head_name, users_manager.area, users_manager.cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users_manager UNION SELECT users_head.created_at, users_head.updated_at, users_head.deleted_at, users_head.deactivation_date, users_head.joining_date, users_head.id, users_head.nik_pcs, users_head.username, users_head.email, users_head.nama_lengkap, users_head.referral_code, users_head.company, users_head.role, users_head.leader_id, users_head.sales_leader_id, users_head.leader_name, users_head.sales_manager_id, users_head.manager_name, users_head.sales_head_id, users_head.head_name, users_head.area, users_head.cdc_sync_at_utc FROM users_head;
